label: Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory

node.label: Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory
node.definition: Long-context memory compresses, summarizes, selects, or hierarchically indexes prior tokens so useful information can survive beyond a model’s active window.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory is to connect Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention, Context windows & working memory to downstream capabilities including Neural search, RAG & question answering, Tutoring, translation & knowledge work.
examples: substrate for Neural search, RAG & question answering
substrate for Tutoring, translation & knowledge work
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention, Context windows & working memory.

dependencies.rationale: Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory uses Sparse, local, linear & recurrent attention as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory stores, selects, or obtains information through Context windows & working memory.
Long-context attention, compression & summarization memory stores, selects, or obtains information through Embeddings & distributed representations.
